license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.s2zegf6
title: YEP Medium
author: Roscoff Culture Collection

steps_raw.instruction: Filter 1L of aged seawater (at least two months) on prefilter and 0.2 µm filter
To 300 mL of seawater, add : 1 g Difco bacto-peptone 1 g Bacto yeast extract 10 g D-glucose anhydrous
Complete final volume to 500mL of seawater
Under laminar flow hood, filter the medium on 0.2 microns Stericup
